etymology.description: 肉(肉) (ròu, "meat") + 犬(犬) (quǎn, "dog") = depiction of a dog and meat
etymology.interpretation: The character 肰(rán) combines the meanings of 肉(肉) (ròu, "meat") and 犬(犬) (quǎn, "dog"), implying a relationship or action involving meat and dogs, serving as a semantic component.
